history.hypothesis: The current prompt allows verbose descriptions that inflate token count and cost without improving reward; adding a strict one-sentence limit per finding will reduce generated tokens and lower cost while preserving the correctness already demonstrated.

The current prompt references a JSON contract but never defines the required schema or prohibits markdown wrapping, which risks parser failures or verbose output on harder diffs; hard-coding the exact JSON schema and raw-output rule into the system prompt ensures the model emits compact, valid, parser-friendly output every time.
